questionHtml: Show that a mass of about 240 kg of air moves through the fan every second.
markschemeHtml:
πR2 OR «mass of air through system per unit time =» Avρ seen ✓

244 «kg s−1» ✓

 

Accept use of Energy of air per second = 0.5 ρΑv3 = 0.5 mv2 for MP1.

meta.title: Show that a mass of about 240 kg of air moves through the fan every second.
